title: Mason Cash in The Meadow Size 30 Mixing Bowl 21cm | 1.1 Litre Floral Embossed Earthenware Bowl for Baking, Prep & Serving | Dishwasher Safe
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: MIXING BOWL | The Mason Cash In the Meadow Size 30 Mixing Bowl measures 21cm with a 1.1L capacity. Ideal for smaller batches of pastry, cake, or cookie mixes and great for baking with children.
FLORAL-INSPIRED DESIGN | Embossed with delicate florals and foliage, the pastel colour palette adds fresh elegance to any kitchen.
DURABLE EARTHENWARE | Lightweight and easy to hold for comfortable mixing, yet sturdy enough for countertop use; finished with a chip-resistant, high-gloss glaze for lasting beauty.

IN THE MEADOW | Bring floral elegance to your kitchen with the exquisite In the Meadow Collection. Featuring intricate floral embossments in soft pastel shades, each piece is inspired by a unique bloom—from classic cream roses to cheerful yellow daffodils.

MASON CASH | First designed in 1901, the original Mason Cash mixing bowl has stood the test of time to become a design classic. Today, Mason Cash is equally celebrated for its iconic pudding basins, cane pet bowls and traditional bakeware.
